designSystem.summary: Liquid-Glass-Fitness-Dashboard: frosted-glass Cards (Radius 22pt) über diagonalem Dreifarb-Gradient (Light #F0F7FF→#9BD2FF, Dark #050814→#0E1A36); Domänen-Akzente Energie-Gelb #F5B400, Vital-Grün #5CC63F, Statistik-Blau #2E6DF0, Streak-Koralle #FF6B4A; SF Pro / SF Pro Rounded
